assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: File outputs/after-overview.png exists with sha256 70b358d5db82e0bcf3229c43659a7780c9e054117179386986e1e7c53df4860e. The overview dashboard was the only affected dashboard and one screenshot was produced.

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: File is named 'after-overview.png' which clearly identifies the overview dashboard.

assertions.description: Only after-change screenshots are present (no before screenshots) since user did not request before/after
assertions.evidence: Only one file exists in outputs/: after-overview.png. No before-*.png files present.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded (not blank/loading)
assertions.evidence: Screenshot shows the Engineering Overview dashboard with all stat panels loaded (Deployment Frequency: 4.8 deploys/wk, Lead Time: 4.2 days, Change Fail Rate: 26.3%, MTTR: 1.2 weeks, Active Copilot Seats: 14, Acceptance Rate: 32.3%, Copilot PR Rate: 70.9%, Lines Accepted: 24422). Panels are fully rendered with colored backgrounds, not blank or showing loading states.
